output.code:
# Let's open the file to confirm content and structure
with open('/mnt/data/file-7cGqQ3JMRfb1deXXjB1ygx-text_to_analyse.txt', 'rb') as f:
    raw = f.read()
print(raw.decode('utf-8'))

raw = raw.decode('utf-8')
spans_texts = [
    'إِنَّ اللَّهَ يَأْمُرُكُمْ أَنْ تُؤَدُّوا الْأَمَانَاتِ إِلَى أَهْلِهَا',
    'يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا اتَّقُوا اللَّهَ وَقُولُوا قَوْلًا سَدِيدًا',
    'وَأَوْفُوا الْكَيْلَ إِذَا كِلْتُمْ وَزِنُوا بِالْقِسْطَاسِ الْمُسْتَقِيمِ ذَٰلِكَ خَيْرٌ وَأَحْسَنُ تَأْوِيلًا',
    'آية المنافق ثلاث: إذا حدث كذب، وإذا وعد أخلف، وإذا اؤتمن خان'
]
# find occurrences
for text in spans_texts:
    print("Searching:", text)
    idxs = []
    start = 0
    while True:
        i = raw.find(text, start)
        if i == -1:
            break
        idxs.append(i)
        start = i + 1
    print("Found at:", idxs)

output = []
# first span has two occurrences
text1 = spans_texts[0]
for start in [188, 475]:
    end = start + len(text1)
    # assertion
    assert raw[start:end] == text1
    output.append({'span_start': start, 'span_end': end, 'span_text': text1, 'citation_type': 'Aya'})
# second span
text2 = spans_texts[1]
start=342
end = start + len(text2)
assert raw[start:end] == text2
output.append({'span_start': start, 'span_end': end, 'span_text': text2, 'citation_type': 'Aya'})
# third
text3 = spans_texts[2]
start=615
end = start + len(text3)
assert raw[start:end] == text3
output.append({'span_start': start, 'span_end': end, 'span_text': text3, 'citation_type': 'Aya'})
# fourth - hadith
text4 = spans_texts[3]
start=783
end = start + len(text4)
assert raw[start:end] == text4
output.append({'span_start': start, 'span_end': end, 'span_text': text4, 'citation_type': 'Hadeeth'})
output
